name: image_flux2
description: Flux 2 Dev single-reference image edit pipeline using full-precision FP8-mixed weights (cloud-compatible, no GGUF). Edits an input image guided by a text prompt via ReferenceLatent conditioning. Runs 20 euler steps by default (LoRA turbo mode disabled via the internal ComfySwitchNode toggle). Input image is scaled to ~1 megapixel before encoding; output aspect ratio matches the input image.

prompt.description: Text instruction describing the edit to apply to the input image (e.g., 'Add a pale yellow knitted beanie with a white patch reading FLUX.2 COMFY').

image.description: Reference image to edit. Output aspect ratio and approximate content layout are inherited from this image.
